dismissalText.commentary: Sai Sudharsan c †Sharma b Kumar 12 (12b 2x4 0x6 20m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: The bouncer has brought about Sai Sudharsan's downfall. Banged in short outside off stump, a very well-directed short ball from Bhuvi. Sai Sudharsan has to fetch that 138.6kph delivery from outside off, he gets a top-edge with the ball ballooning to the short fine leg region. Jitesh runs behind it and takes a comfortable catch

dismissalText.commentary: Shubman Gill c Patidar b Hazlewood 10 (8b 2x4 0x6 13m) SR: 125

dismissalComment.html: Straight up, straight up and Gill is out of here. The aggression of Gill goes against him this time around. Back of a length ball outside off, Gill stays inside his crease this time to the 142kph delivery. He looks to go across the line, gets it on the higher part of the bat, with the ball spooning up. Patidar runs to his right from mid-off and takes a good catch

dismissalText.commentary: Nishant Sindhu c Padikkal b Rasikh Salam 20 (18b 3x4 0x6 26m) SR: 111.11

dismissalComment.html: Straight down Padikkal's throat at long-on. Another one bites the dust as Sindhu walks back. Rising back of a length ball on middle at 132kph. He charges down the track but is not in control as he goes for the pull. Also loses his balance in playing that shot with the ball only going as far as DDP who is stationed perfectly.

dismissalText.commentary: Jos Buttler st †Sharma b Pandya 19 (23b 1x4 0x6 40m) SR: 82.6

dismissalComment.html: Five-head Krunal outfoxes Buttler! Sees him dance down, so he yorks him wide. 114ks, lands in line with Buttler's back-knee after beating bat. Buttler's upper body froze late as he reached out, trying to scythe the ball away. Too late and Krunal celebrates with intensity. GT's big three toppled!

dismissalText.commentary: Arshad Khan c Rasikh Salam b Hazlewood 15 (6b 0x4 2x6 10m) SR: 250

dismissalComment.html: Forget Ben, It's Josh cutting off Arshad's attack. Trademark back-of-length ball skidded and rushed Arshad. He was back in the crease, swivelling for the pull. Ball came under belly-height. He got cramped - upper-body bent down, elbows weren't extended and the top edge went straight to short fine leg.

dismissalText.commentary: Rahul Tewatia c Patidar b Rasikh Salam 7 (5b 1x4 0x6 12m) SR: 140

dismissalComment.html: Tewatia goes and the crowd go up bigtime! 131ks length ball angling in towards fourth stump from around the wicket. The cross-seamer seemed to lose pace off the pitch and bounced a touch low. Tewatia extended his arms and looked to lift it over mid-on with a mostly horizontal bat. Ball hit low on the bat and Patidar ran back to take a rather easy catch. Rasikh is pumped, he's had a great game so far

dismissalText.commentary: Jason Holder c Hazlewood b Kumar 7 (5b 1x4 0x6 13m) SR: 140

dismissalComment.html: Top edge. Will there be confusion? No, Hazlewood keeps the keeper at bay and allows Bhuvi to get to 28 wickets this season! 128ks short ball around fifth stump, seam up. Seemed slow off the pitch but bounced good. Holder was square-on, jumped and looked to drag it across with a pull. Edged it right back, Jitesh ran straight but Hazlewood ran across from short third and took it. Seemed to have made the call early as Jitesh slowed down
